'''Carbonite guns''', also known as '''carbonite rifles''', were weapons that fired a short stream of liquid [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] that solidified on contact with a target. It was a very formidable weapon capable of immobilizing everything from small [[Infantry/Legends|infantry]] such as a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] to extremely large opponents such as a [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]]. They could also be used to disable mechanical devices such as [[Tank/Legends|tanks]].

==Description==
The carbonite gun appeared quite like an ordinary [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] at first glance. However, unlike the blaster rifle, the gun emitted a deep ion blue blast when fired that could render an enemy immobile and defenseless for a considerable amount of [[Time/Legends|time]]. During the time the target was immobilized, they could be attacked without a chance for self-defense, or in some cases, simply be smashed by a blow from the weapons' reinforced butt. After a few moments, however, they would thaw, and there was no sign of [[Hibernation sickness/Legends|hibernation sickness]]. The enemy could easily attack as if nothing had happened. These weapons had a short range but in the right hands could be an extremely effective and fearsome weapon.

The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in its reports noted that the weapons made their enemies formidable warriors when wielding these.

==History==
The gun was originally invented by [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]]; however, the weapon had fallen into the possession of several groups afterward.

In [[980 BBY]], carbonite guns were discussed as a potential method of subduing [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]]. The notion was discarded in favor of the [[senflax]] provided by [[Serra]]. The [[Darth Cognus|Huntress]] indicated that their effects lasted for a few [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]], not a few moments, so these may have been more advanced than what previously existed.

The [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] often equipped their [[Pyn'gani]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]], who were quite adept with [[Mining/Legends|mining]] carbonite, with these weapons when using them to conquer planets.<ref name="EAW">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''</ref>

[[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] are known to have encountered and perhaps used a carbonite gun during [[Operation Shadow Hand]].<ref name="MOTS">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
In the video games ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'', the carbonite gun can only be used by the [[Pyn'gani]].
